title: PCR and cloning
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"PD7P4","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"KWCzN","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"1dns0","text":"Amplification of DNA was performed by two set of published hexon gene primers, H1/H2 and H3/H4 [Raue and Hess, 1998] and fiber gene primer, FibF/FibR, FibF: 5`-GGTCTACCCCTTTTGGCTCC-3` and FibR: 5`-GCGTCGTAGATGAAGGGAGG-3` [Norfitriah et al., 2018] according to manufacture protocol (Bioline, UK). The PCR products were analyzed by electrophoresis in a 1% agarose gel stained with RedSafe™ Nuclei Acid Staining solution (iNtRON, Korea) at 70 volts for 45 minutes and visualized under U.V. transillumination. Purification of PCR products were carried out by using MEGAquick-spin™ Total Fragment DNA Purification kit (iNtRON) based on the manufacture recommendation. Purified PCR products from H1/H2 and FibF/FibR were cloned into the pCR™ 2.1-TOPO® vector using TOPO TA Cloning kit (Invitrogen, USA). Positive cloned was analyzed by colony-PCR prior plasmid extraction using DNA-spin™ Plasmid DNA Purification kit (iNtRON) and stored at -20°C until used. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":255877,"guid":"4223F010341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"TOPO\u0026trade; TA Cloning\u0026trade; Kit, with pCR\u0026trade;2.1-TOPO\u0026trade;, One Shot TOP10 Chemically Competent \u003ci\u003eE. coli\u003c/i\u003e, and PureLink\u0026trade; Quick Plasmid Miniprep Kit","mol_weight":0,"sku":"K450002","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/K450002","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":440,"name":"Thermo Fisher","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/440.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/440.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
creator: Norfitriah Mohamed Sohaimi
